calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Sep-30-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Genre Benitez for and with Valerie Smith.

The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-09-2011 Continued To Aug-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-19-2011 Continued To Aug-09-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-14-2011 Continued To Jul-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Crisostomo Ibarra for Valerie Smith (Administrator).

Mr. Cristosomo stated that the Petition for Final Distribution has been drafted but that he was waiting for Ms. Smith to gather all documents, waiting for final numbers and a report from the CPA. The accounting petition was continued to July 19, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harrison.
